title: Soulmade
body:
!! This is side project at the moment !!
  Main mod that i work on rn: [https://modrinth.com/mod/runeforged-arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/runeforged-arsenal)

![Using The Soul Greatsword from 2.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac918769b3f43e204e22cfe20726a17b36c20d7d_0.webp)A soul-themed mod that adds some mainly combat items![All the items for now](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ca5b87788bb077a7b4148a0f56a6dde0cbcae0.png)

Items:
Soul Curvesword - Does the same as netherite sword but on right click makes a 3 block radius zone for 2s that damages anyone in range (for 1hp/s) (Has cooldown)
Soul Force Field - Pushes all entities (Including arrows) from you on right click (Has cooldown)
Soul Cleaver - Has default fire aspect, on right click creates a one-time zone with 5 block radius that sets entities on fire

Blocks:
Soul Dominance (Not implemented) - _~~Creates a temporal zone that does not allow to go in, but ignores entities that was inside when placed~~_

The items come with small animations (Not all, mod is in alpha state)
